goals: Calculate future value of savings for a research trip to study Soviet-era historical sites in Eastern Europe
Compare future values across different interest rate scenarios to determine optimal savings strategy for funding a research project
Calculate present value of a future research grant to understand its current worth for budgeting purposes
Compare discount options for booking group travel to historical sites to minimize costs

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and skeptical. Challenges established narratives with data-driven arguments. Prefers concrete numbers over vague assertions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knowledgeable about Soviet history and Eastern European regional economics. Unfamiliar with financial calculation tools or APIs. Needs explanations for financial concepts.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations needed to plan their research trip budget and compare investment scenarios for funding future historical research.
